title: Bridesmaid Bouquets - Set of 4 Ivory White Artificial Flowers Bouquet Wedding Rustic Small Floral Centerpieces for Marriage Proposal Party Anniversary Dining Table Decorations
features: WEDDING BRIDESMAID BOUQUET - Handmade white roses bouquets are good size, classic and elegant, perfect for wedding bridesmaid bouquets, 4 flower bouquets are enough for wedding bridesmaids.

BOUQUET INCLUDES - Wedding bridesmaids bouquets set of 4 including beautiful arrangements of cream white roses, hydrangea, gypsophila, eucalyptus, and complimenting foliage. Rustic bridesmaid flower bouquet looks full and wrapped with hemp rope.

CENTERPIECES DECORATION SET - 7 Inch artificial flowers bouquets can not only be used as a bridesmaid bouquet, but can also be placed in a vase as a centerpiece, or as a home, dining table, wedding, party, or meeting room decoration.

REALISTIC ARTIFICIAL FLOWERS - These artificial bridesmaids flowers are made of realistic fabric floral, high quality, and look like nature's roses from a distance, giving your wedding a different decorative feel.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL FLOWER BOUQUETS - Mini bridesmaids bouquets can also be used in proposal parties, wedding anniversary, ceremony anniversaries, and vintage parties to make your party more romantic and meaningful.
description: About SEMONONIA Bridesmaid Bouquets for Wedding Specification -Material: White Rose, and hydrangea paired with eucalyptus leaf and gypsophila branch, made a romantic, bridesmaids posy. -Color: White Ivory Greenery -Size of bouquets: About 10*7.5inch Packing Including -4 × wedding flowers bouquets Feature -Perfect for bud vases and wedding centerpieces. -This is a beautiful looking white bouquet, whether you plan on holding it or putting it in a vase. -The flower bouquet is a decent size, perfect for bridesmaids or just as decor. -Bouquets were well packaged. The hemp rope were wrapped and secured so they didn't tangle. -Insert into vase or mason jar as a decoration
